subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself with truth and revealed unto men that which every mighty one and every powerful one had failed to achieve, and hath sent down the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر بالحق و اظهر للناس ما عجز عنه کل قوی و کل قادر و انزل الآیات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
